title: westringia viminalis
intro: Westringia viminalis, also known as the flowering Westringia, is a native Australian shrub that belongs to the mint family and is characterized by its fragrant leaves and purple or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Westringia viminalis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from colds, fever, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to aid digestion and reduce anxiety. Westringia viminalis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract its medicinal properties.
